programme.desc: Cheech Marin and Tommy Chong discuss their lifelong friendship and popularity as a comedic duo. Features interviews, sketches and never-before-seen footage spanning their five-decade career.

programme.title: Super
programme.desc: After his wife (Liv Tyler) leaves him, a fry cook (Rainn Wilson) emulates a TV superhero and transforms himself into a costumed vigilante.

programme.title: Pootie Tang
programme.desc: Adapted from a comedy sketch on HBO's The Chris Rock Show, Pootie Tang (Lance Crouther) is the ultimate superhero. A cool-walking, smooth-talking lady's man, Pootie is a hero and a role model to all the kids of the neighborhood. Everybody looks up to Pootie except evil Dick Lecter (Robert Vaughn), CEO of Lecter Corp., a company that makes cigarettes, alcohol and fast food. Pootie shows cool determination and strength to prevail over Lecter and his minions.

programme.title: The Boys Are Back
programme.desc: After the untimely passing of his second wife, Joe (Clive Owen) must deal with his grief as he strives to find a way to raise his sons alone. The boys, Artie and Harry, are trying to cope with their own emotional baggage, so the three decide to throw convention to the wind and live by the words "just say yes." When things go wrong, Joe must find a way to behave more like a parent while maintaining the joys of a more-carefree life.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: New York City writer Iris finds her comfortable, solitary life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. The huge dog immediately creates practical problems for Iris, from furniture destruction to eviction notices, as well as more existential ones. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past, and her own creative inner life.

programme.title: American Son
programme.desc: A freshly graduated Marine returns home to his dysfunctional family for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Expend4bles
programme.desc: Armed with every weapon they can get their hands on, the Expendables are the world's last line of defense and the team that gets called when all other options are off the table.

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part VII -- The New Blood
programme.desc: Years after the strange drowning death of her father, Tina Shepard (Lar Park Lincoln) returns to the site of his demise, Crystal Lake. Her developing psychic powers were responsible for ending his life, leaving Tina riddled with guilt as an adult. While deceitful Dr. Crews (Terry Kiser) tries to manipulate her abilities for his own ends, both physician and patient are in for a shock when Tina's powers unwittingly free camper-killer Jason Voorhees from his watery slumber.

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part VIII: Jason Takes Manhattan
programme.desc: Mass murderer Jason Voorhees (Kane Hodder) is resurrected from the bottom of Crystal Lake. After he kills a passing boat's occupants, he stows away on a cruise ship filled with a high-school graduating class bound for New York City. Biology teacher Charles McCulloch (Peter Mark Richman) is on board with his niece, Rennie (Jensen Daggett), who has visions of Jason drowning as a child. They escape his bloody shipboard rampage, but, when Rennie and Charles reach Manhattan, Jason is close by.

programme.title: Sleepy Hollow
programme.desc: Constable Ichabod Crane is sent to the village of Sleepy Hollow, where a headless horseman is leaving a trail of decapitated bodies.

programme.title: The Presidio
programme.desc: Ex-military policeman Jay Austin (Mark Harmon) is now a San Francisco detective. When his former MP partner is killed at a military base, he takes the case. But after arriving at the crime scene, he realizes he must look to his old rival, Lt. Col. Alan Caldwell (Sean Connery), for help. Austin then falls for Caldwell's daughter, Donna (Meg Ryan), further complicating matters. Still, the two men push on in their search, learning to respect one another as they pursue the killer.

programme.title: Panic Room
programme.desc: Trapped in their New York brownstone's panic room, a hidden chamber built as a sanctuary in the event of break-ins, newly divorced Meg Altman (Jodie Foster) and her young daughter Sarah (Kristen Stewart) play a deadly game of cat-and-mouse with three intruders - Burnham (Forest Whitaker), Raoul (Dwight Yoakam) and Junior (Jared Leto) - during a brutal home invasion. But the room itself is the focal point because what the intruders really want is inside it.

programme.title: The Informers
programme.desc: In the 1980s Los Angeles, a group of self-absorbed hedonists drift through their lives without the benefit of a moral compass. A movie executive (Billy Bob Thornton) carries on an affair with a newscaster, while his son (Jon Foster) tries to sort out his relationship with his promiscuous girlfriend (Amber Heard). Meanwhile, a sleazy ex-con (Mickey Rourke) hatches a plan to sell a kidnapped child for some quick cash.

programme.title: No Mercy
programme.desc: After his partner is killed by the merciless crime boss Losado, Chicago cop Eddie Jillette takes to New Orleans to settle the score. When he finds Losado's mistress, Michel, Eddie handcuffs himself to the girl and heads for the bayou in an effort to draw out his rival. And though squatting in a swamp handcuffed to another person is no recipe for romance, Eddie and Michel soon find themselves falling in love even as Losado is closing in.

programme.title: The Evil That Men Do
programme.desc: A hit man leaves retirement to stop a British torturer serving the regime in Guatemala.

programme.title: The Pledge
programme.desc: On the day of his retirement, detective Jerry Black (Jack Nicholson) accepts a gift -- an airline ticket to Mexico. But when the body of a murdered eight-year-old girl is discovered in the mountains, Jerry offers his expertise at the crime scene. When an ambitious younger cop wrenches a dubious confession from a simple-minded suspect, the case is closed... but not for Jerry.

programme.title: Clive Barker's The Plague
programme.desc: Left comatose for 10 years, teenagers awaken to possess strange powers and a thirst for blood.

programme.title: Flatliners
programme.desc: Seeking answers about the afterlife, Chicago medical student Nelson (Kiefer Sutherland) persuades his fellow pupils to help him end his life, and then resuscitate him in the nick of time. Atheist David (Kevin Bacon), playboy Joe (William Baldwin) and troubled Rachel (Julia Roberts) also journey into the unknown, looking for meaning in their own lives. As the experiments become more perilous, each is forced to contend with the paranormal consequences of trespassing on the other side.

programme.title: Panic Room
programme.desc: Trapped in their New York brownstone's panic room, a hidden chamber built as a sanctuary in the event of break-ins, newly divorced Meg Altman (Jodie Foster) and her young daughter Sarah (Kristen Stewart) play a deadly game of cat-and-mouse with three intruders - Burnham (Forest Whitaker), Raoul (Dwight Yoakam) and Junior (Jared Leto) - during a brutal home invasion. But the room itself is the focal point because what the intruders really want is inside it.

programme.title: The Informers
programme.desc: In the 1980s Los Angeles, a group of self-absorbed hedonists drift through their lives without the benefit of a moral compass. A movie executive (Billy Bob Thornton) carries on an affair with a newscaster, while his son (Jon Foster) tries to sort out his relationship with his promiscuous girlfriend (Amber Heard). Meanwhile, a sleazy ex-con (Mickey Rourke) hatches a plan to sell a kidnapped child for some quick cash.

programme.title: No Mercy
programme.desc: After his partner is killed by the merciless crime boss Losado, Chicago cop Eddie Jillette takes to New Orleans to settle the score. When he finds Losado's mistress, Michel, Eddie handcuffs himself to the girl and heads for the bayou in an effort to draw out his rival. And though squatting in a swamp handcuffed to another person is no recipe for romance, Eddie and Michel soon find themselves falling in love even as Losado is closing in.

programme.title: Hard Times
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, Chaney (Charles Bronson) bare-knuckle boxes to survive. Speed (James Coburn), an avid gambler, recognizes his talent and becomes his manager. They hire a cut man named Poe (Strother Martin), and Speed borrows cash from some gangsters to bet on Chaney's fight. They win, but Speed gambles and loses his portion and remains in debt. In the end, a rival manager named Gandil (Michael McGuire) buys Speed's debt and forces Chaney to fight Speed against his toughest foe yet.

programme.title: The Cave
programme.desc: Deadly monsters hunt members (Cole Hauser, Morris Chestnut, Eddie Cibrian) of an exploration team within a vast network of caverns beneath the Carpathian Mountains.

programme.title: The Hunt for Eagle One
programme.desc: A lieutenant (Mark Dacascos) leads his men in a daring mission to rescue a captain (Theresa Randle) who is trapped behind enemy lines.

programme.title: The Hunt for Eagle One: Crash Point
programme.desc: Marines venture into enemy territory to retrieve an anti-hijacking device stolen by terrorists.

programme.title: Gladiator
programme.desc: After whipping a rival in a brawl, Chicago teen Tommy Riley (James Marshall) is asked to box in the illegal fights organized by Jimmy Horn (Brian Dennehy). Tommy has bigger aspirations, but when Jimmy agrees to cover the betting debts his father (John Heard) incurred, Tommy agrees. He soon befriends Abraham Lincoln Haines (Cuba Gooding Jr.), a black boxer helping to support his family. When Jimmy realizes that the friends are his two top draws, he matches them in a bout neither wants.

programme.title: The Poker Club
programme.desc: When their traditional poker night is broken up by the arrival of a burglar, lifelong friends Aaron (Johnathon Schaech), Curtis (Loren Dean), Bill (Johnny Messner) and Neal (Michael Risley) panic and beat the intruder to death. As police Detective Patterson (Judy Reyes) investigates the origins of a corpse found in a nearby river, the cardsharps find themselves terrorized by a mysterious potential witness to their crime -- one determined to take bloody revenge on them for the killing.

programme.title: Felon
programme.desc: A new convict (Stephen Dorff) struggles to maintain his sanity and sense of humanity after he's thrust into a prison system in which a brutal guard (Harold Perrineau) encourages gladiatorial combat between inmates.

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: The Zachary family live quietly on a cattle ranch in post-Civil War Texas. A stranger (Joseph Wiseman) appears and disturbs their bucolic existence by spreading a malicious rumor that their adopted daughter, Rachel (Audrey Hepburn), is a Kiowa Native American. Soon, the Zachary brothers (Audie Murphy, Burt Lancaster) and their mother (Lillian Gish) must defend themselves from both racist whites and vengeful Kiowa.

programme.title: Planet Action
programme.desc: A look at how celebrities are stepping up to make a difference in the world and hopefully inspiring others to do the same.

programme.title: The Mountain Men
programme.desc: Two old-time Wyoming fur trappers (Charlton Heston, Brian Keith) try to protect a runaway Indian (Victoria Racimo) from her angry ex-mate.

programme.title: Seraphim Falls
programme.desc: Gideon (Pierce Brosnan), a former Union officer, finds himself the prey of a manhunt led by Carver (Liam Neeson), Gideon's Civil-War nemesis. Carver blames Gideon for a horrible war crime and refuses to give up the chase until his vengeance is complete. Gideon, though wounded, manages to stay one step ahead of his pursuers, until he and his mortal enemy meet in a final inevitable showdown.

programme.title: Oklahoma Crude
programme.desc: A wildcatter (Faye Dunaway), her father (John Mills) and a boozing drifter (George C. Scott) defend her oil derrick in 1913 Oklahoma.

programme.title: The Texican
programme.desc: Deputy Jess Carlin (Audie Murphy) leaves his Texas hometown in disgrace, framed by corrupt saloon owner Luke Starr (Broderick Crawford) for a crime he didn't commit. When his brother, muckraking newspaper editor Roy Carlin (Víctor Vilanova), is murdered after printing an exposé of Starr's crooked deals, Carlin returns home from the Mexican border town where he's been holed up and enlists his brother's fiancée (Luz Márquez) and saloon dancer Kit O'Neal (Diana Lorys) to bring Starr down.

programme.title: Comanche Station
programme.desc: When solitary cowboy Jefferson Cody (Randolph Scott) hears tales of a white woman living as a captive of the Comanche tribe, he rides deep into the tribe's territory to exchange goods for her freedom. As Cody escorts the captive woman away, he learns that she is Nancy Lowe (Nancy Gates), and that there is a sizable reward offered by her husband for her return. Cody and Mrs. Lowe must brave ruthless bounty hunters greedy for the reward, as well as the now-warring Comanches, to make it to safety.

programme.title: The Man From Colorado
programme.desc: In Colorado at the end of the Civil War, Col. Owen Devereaux (Glenn Ford), affected by four years of brutal bloodshed, orders the massacre of a Confederate unit, even as they try to surrender. Devereaux's friend and second in command, Capt. Del Stewart (William Holden), is the only one aware of the surrender attempt. Devereaux returns home to a hero's welcome and is appointed a judge, yet his irrational and angry behavior continues, affecting his fianceé, Caroline (Ellen Drew), as well as Del.

programme.title: The Nines
programme.desc: Three actors (Ryan Reynolds, Hope Davis, Melissa McCarthy) tackle the principal roles in a trio of stories. In "The Prisoner," a publicist and a neighbor are the only links to the outside world for an actor under house arrest. "Reality Television" charts the production of a TV sitcom. In "Knowing," a video-game designer and his family are stranded in the forest after their car breaks down.

programme.title: The Return of Eliot Ness
programme.desc: In 1947 Chicago, detective Eliot Ness comes out of retirement after the murder of Martin Labine, a former cop suspected of Mafia connections. As an old colleague, Ness takes the case extremely personally, and makes it his sole mission to track down whoever's responsible for the crime. Along the way, Ness partners with Labine's son, Gil, as they delve into the Mafia. Meanwhile, the two have to avoid ending up casualties in the ongoing gang war.

programme.title: Borderline
programme.desc: Dr. Lila Coletti (Gina Gershon) is a psychiatrist to mentally disturbed prison inmates. She's also a recent divorcée, devastated after losing custody of her children. So when her ex-husband and his girlfriend are murdered, Coletti emerges as the prime suspect of the investigating officer, Det. Macy Kobacek (Michael Biehn). Coletti soon learns the killer is obsessed ex-con Ed Baikman (Sean Patrick Flanery), a former patient who threatens to incriminate Coletti unless she gives in to his demands.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: Computer programmer Angela Bennett (Sandra Bullock) starts a new freelance gig and, strangely, all her colleagues start dying. Does it have something to do with the mysterious disc she was given? Her suspicions are raised when, during a trip to Mexico, she's seduced by a handsome stranger (Jeremy Northam) intent on locating the same disc. Soon Angela is tangled up in a far-reaching conspiracy that leads to her identity being erased. Can she stop the same thing from happening to her life?

programme.title: The Waterdance
programme.desc: Injured in a climbing accident, writer Joel Garcia (Eric Stoltz) wakes up in a hospital having lost the use of his legs. Soon after, he's placed in a recovery ward where he begins the arduous process of rehabilitation and meets others with injuries like his own. Raymond (Wesley Snipes) is a ladies' man whose girl has nevertheless split, and Bloss (William Forsythe) is a rather prejudiced biker. Together, this unlikely trio helps one another to overcome the greatest challenge of their lives.

programme.title: The Principal
programme.desc: The new principal (James Belushi) of a drug-infested high school joins with a security guard (Louis Gossett Jr.) to clean it up.

programme.title: Planet Action
programme.desc: A look at how celebrities are stepping up to make a difference in the world and hopefully inspiring others to do the same.

programme.title: Planet Action
programme.desc: Special: Posthumanism; Trivia: Blade Runner 2049; Top 3: Posthumanism Movies; PBTS: Joe Letteri (VFX Supervisor 'Alita: Battle Angel'); MR: The Substance; AHOTW: Jude Law.

programme.title: Love Lies Bleeding
programme.desc: A corrupt DEA agent (Christian Slater) chases a young couple (Jenna Dewan, Brian Geraghty) who are in possession of money from a botched drug deal.

programme.title: No Mercy
programme.desc: After his partner is killed by the merciless crime boss Losado, Chicago cop Eddie Jillette takes to New Orleans to settle the score. When he finds Losado's mistress, Michel, Eddie handcuffs himself to the girl and heads for the bayou in an effort to draw out his rival. And though squatting in a swamp handcuffed to another person is no recipe for romance, Eddie and Michel soon find themselves falling in love even as Losado is closing in.

programme.title: The Informers
programme.desc: In the 1980s Los Angeles, a group of self-absorbed hedonists drift through their lives without the benefit of a moral compass. A movie executive (Billy Bob Thornton) carries on an affair with a newscaster, while his son (Jon Foster) tries to sort out his relationship with his promiscuous girlfriend (Amber Heard). Meanwhile, a sleazy ex-con (Mickey Rourke) hatches a plan to sell a kidnapped child for some quick cash.

programme.title: Fathers and Sons
programme.desc: ESP and danger bond a beach-town intellectual (Jeff Goldblum) and his son (Rory Cochrane) despite their clashing friends and lives.

programme.title: The Principal
programme.desc: The new principal (James Belushi) of a drug-infested high school joins with a security guard (Louis Gossett Jr.) to clean it up.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: An Army sergeant (James Belushi), his crew (Mark Lee, Paul Empson) and stragglers try to hold off a Nazi battalion at a Libyan waterhole.

programme.title: Hanover Street
programme.desc: A U.S. bomber pilot (Harrison Ford) goes on a secret World War II mission with his English lover's (Lesley-Anne Down) husband (Christopher Plummer).

programme.title: The Wackiest Ship in the Army
programme.desc: Lt. Rip Crandall (Jack Lemmon) is entrusted with one of the most important missions of his World War II career: to shuttle an Australian spy (Chips Rafferty) into enemy territory. Unfortunately, he'll be doing it with one of the Navy's least seaworthy vessels, the USS Echo. But even in a clunker of a ship, Crandall and his madcap crew -- including his enthusiastic young ensign (Ricky Nelson) -- do their best to make their ill-equipped mission a success.

programme.title: Taqdeerwala
programme.desc: A poor man Suraj wrestles debts, discovers a prophetic book, becomes rich, and fights to save his mother while gods chase the book across Earth.

programme.title: Raaz (2002)
programme.desc: A troubled couple visits a hill station to save their marriage, only to uncover chilling supernatural secrets. As darkness closes in, they must face terrifying truths from the past to survive.

programme.title: Sheshnaag
programme.desc: Shape-shifting serpents guard sacred treasures, waging fierce battles against greed, betrayal, and dark sorcery in a tale of devotion, vengeance, and magic.

programme.title: Heyy Babyy
programme.desc: Three Sydney bachelors' dating lives are disrupted by the surprise arrival of a dimpled little roommate.

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: A strict bank manager, betrayed by an employee, seeks revenge by enlisting three blind men to rob the bank; the plan soon backfires dramatically.

programme.title: Jeevan Ek Sanghursh
programme.desc: Karan, a thief, works for Dr Devraj to stop evil Don Rattan. He reunites with his disowned family, changing his life.

programme.title: Tadipaar
programme.desc: Shankar meets the love of his life. A plot is hatched to replace a princess with Shankar's new love, the spitting image of the royal.

programme.title: Vaastu Shastra
programme.desc: An author and his family move into an old house. They ignore the strange occurrences till the murders begin.

programme.title: Comedy Station
programme.desc: Sahil Khattar and his monkey friend Rancho engage in hilarious, witty conversations that entertain and bring laughter, showcasing their unique and playful bond.

programme.desc: Rooh Baba ventures into a haunted Kolkata estate, confronting two vengeful spirits, each claiming to be the notorious Manjulika.

programme.title: Taare Zameen Par
programme.desc: A compassionate teacher helps a misunderstood child overcome learning difficulties through encouragement, creativity and emotional support, transforming his confidence and future positively.

programme.title: The Shallows
programme.desc: Nancy travels to a secluded beach following the death of her mother. While surfing, she gets attacked by a great white shark, which leaves her stranded on a rock 200 yards from the shore.

programme.title: Kantara
programme.desc: A young tribal dons ancestral traditions to seek justice amid betrayal.

programme.title: Thamma
programme.desc: Two lovers battle magic, family ties, and nature to defend their romance in a mystical world where ancient powers and prophecies threaten to keep them apart.

programme.title: iSmart Shankar
programme.desc: Shankar, a contract killer, manages to escape after murdering a politician. Later, he helps the police find a murderer when an officer's memory is transferred to him.

programme.title: Driver Jamuna
programme.desc: A young female who drives a cab for living lands into trouble when three contract killers ask her to give them a ride. She must find a way to escape the danger.

programme.title: Gold Thief
programme.desc: Bhavani Prasad, a gold appraiser, learns of his grandfather's secret from years ago. As a result, he decides to help him set things right but faces many challenges in his quest.

Starring: Rajinikanth,Akshay Kumar. In Chennai, mobiles begin flying out of people's hands. Dr. Vaseegaran reactivates his robot, Chitti, to battle the bird-like supernatural force of Pakshirajan, who controls the skies.

programme.title: Odela 2
programme.desc: Starring: Tamannaah Bhatia,Hebah Patel. After the dead Tirupathi returns to unleash terror and murder upon Odela, a failed investigation forces Shiva Shakti into a spiritual battle to defeat his evil soul.

programme.title: Hum Aapke Hain Koun
programme.desc: Starring: Madhuri Dixit,Salman Khan. Prem madly loves Nisha, his brother Rajesh's sister-in-law. But when Rajesh's wife dies, the families urge him to marry Nisha for the sake of his baby. Prem and Nisha decide to sacrifice their love.

programme.title: Crew
programme.desc: Starring: Tabu,Kareena Kapoor. Three flight attendants resort to gold smuggling to save their careers after their airline faces bankruptcy, leading to risky choices and life-threatening consequences.

programme.title: Mass Jathara
programme.desc: Starring: Ravi Teja,Sreeleela. An honest policeman stands firmly against injustice and faces his toughest challenge after being transferred to a village ruled by a ruthless drug lord and crime.

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: Starring: Ranveer Singh,Sonu Sood. Simmba's living the crooked cop dream-until a woman's assault flips his world. Now, he's ditching the cash, picking up courage, and going head-to-head with his powerful, criminal boss.

programme.title: Bhajarangi 2
programme.desc: Starring: Shiva Rajkumar,Shruthi Raj. A forest officer uncovers drug baron Araka's scheme: exploiting villagers for drug production. Driven, the officer resolves to halt the operation.

programme.title: Googly
programme.desc: Starring: Yash,Kriti Kharbanda. Sharath and Swathi's love fades after misunderstandings. Years later, they meet again at a wedding, where old feelings resurface and destiny plays its romantic game once more.

programme.title: Anjaana Anjaaani
programme.desc: The film of two strangers, who meet on a bridge intending to commit suicide. After bonding over their shared miseries,they make a pact to live life to the fullest for the next 20 days and explore various adventures together. As they embark on this trip, they begin to develop feelings for each other, leading to a complex and emotional journey. Will they embrace their new-found love or stick to their original plan?
